description: Verso: Legal deed related to the ketubba on recto. Location: Fustat. Dated: 25 Tishrei 1607 Seleucid = 6 October 1295 CE. Muwaffaqa bt. Yirmiya ha-Levi releases her divorced husband Ibrāhīm b. Rashīd al-Kohen from having to pay the delayed marriage payment (me'uḥḥar) mentioned in the torn-up ketubba and all other payments or claims. Signed: Saʿadya b. Yehuda.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
